Corpus / subset: Line- and paragraph-aware ZL3b EVA transcription subset.
Preprocessing rule: Preserves line and paragraph position; parses line-initial, line-final, and paragraph-initial contexts.

Corpus / subset: Voynich ZL3b plus English, Latin, synthetic n-gram, and JSON/structured comparison datasets.
Preprocessing rule: Size-matched comparison; current normalization plus robustness modes where available.

Corpus / subset: ZL3b token set suitable for PCS segmentation.
Preprocessing rule: Prefix length 2, suffix length 1, core as middle component; tokens with empty core excluded.

Corpus / subset: ZL3b token-generation corpus and PCS component inventory.
Preprocessing rule: Operational PCS extraction; fixed-length segmentation variants; train/test holdout splits.

Corpus / subset: Line-preserving ZL3b corpus: 23,753 tokens, 12,688 types, 8,510 lines.
Preprocessing rule: Preserves token order and line boundaries; uses PCS segmentations and morphological families where available.
